content.en:
Corridor of the Mist.

Ye Tian suddenly saw a tree, this tree was not a real tree, it was just a vision.

It's not a big tree, but it's extraordinary.

The tree has dense purple lines, each of which contains a piece of heaven and earth.

Immediately, Ye Tian sat under this tree and began to comprehend the many mysteries contained in this tree.

"Every line of this tree is different, the Tao contained in it is different, but it is the evolution of time and space, and it even helps me to create the supreme technique of time and space. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The reason why it is so difficult to create the supreme technique of time and space is that it is difficult to combine time and space to exert a powerful power, but the purple lines on this tree gave Ye Tian inspiration.

Next, Ye Tian made every effort to comprehend this vision, hoping to comprehend a space-time supreme technique as soon as possible.

Before you know it, a period of time has passed.

Suddenly, the tree disappeared and the vision dissipated.

"It's a pity!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

This vision was the one that helped him the most among the visions he had ever seen, and it was definitely a top-level vision, even if he had comprehended it for a short period of time, he had gained immensely.

And this luck may only be one time, but the vision has been around for too short.

"Fortunately, I'm about to create the space-time supreme skill in my heart, and with a little more time, I should be able to successfully create it. Ye 147 Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

In the long years that followed, Ye Tian did his best to practice the space-time supreme technique he wanted to create.

Fail!

Fail!

Fail again!

Ye Tian summed up his experience from countless failures, coupled with his own perception of the fusion of time and space, as well as the enlightenment harvest of the vision of the Misty Corridor Tree last time.

Under the combination of many factors, Ye Tian finally created a space-time supreme technique on this day.

Touch of the Void!

This is the supreme technique of time and space created by Ye Tian.

I saw that in the void area, Ye Tian's two replica bodies were testing the power of this space-time supreme technique.

One of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies had withdrawn all its defenses, and he didn't even wear an Eternal Arcana.

And the other copy body directly casts the Void Touch!

Airplanes!!!

A purple hand instantly passed through the body of the second copy body, and the next moment the second copy body directly shattered.

One-hit kill!

If it was the peak of the Legend Realm Lord, he would be willing to test the clone, but Ye Tian didn't care.

The power of the Empty Touch is terrifying, almost perfectly combining time and space, although my copy body does not do any defense, but I am strong enough in my own right, in terms of the degree of survival, it is still comparable to the average peak Legendary Realm Lord. In other words, if I cast the Void Touch, I can kill an ordinary Peak Legendary Realm Lord and severely damage an ordinary second-level Peak Legendary Realm Lord. Ye Tian estimated.

I have to say that the peak Legendary Realm Lords who know the highest skills of time and space and those who do not know the highest skills of time and space are at two levels of their own strength.

After creating a space-time supreme technique, Ye Tian was already considered the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, but it was the weakest third-level, unless he created a few more space-time supreme techniques.

But Ye Hao knew very well that he was able to create a space-time supreme technique this time, and he had almost exhausted his perception, and his aura and comprehension could not allow him to create another space-time supreme technique in a short period of time, unless he had other greater opportunities.

Of course, this time he created the space-time supreme technique, which made Ye Tian's strength skyrocket, and he also wanted to relax and not be in a hurry to cultivate.

So, on this day, Ye Tian came to the black long river of the Black Holy Mountain.

He came here again to fish and relax.

And.

This time, his control of the power of time and space control was far from being comparable to before, after all, he was now the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, to put it mildly, he was already the true peak of the Void Region, and there were not many Peak Legendary Realm Lords who were stronger than him.

Shout!!!!

The power of time and space control condenses into a fishing line.Enter the black river.Keep shuttling in the black river world.Look for the fish in the black river。

Thorough!

Go deeper!

This time, Ye Tian seemed very relaxed, and the fishing line turned into the power of space-time control was extremely stable, no matter how the power of the black long river eroded and destroyed, it could not break the fishing line.

Soon.

Ye Tian sensed a fish, this fish was covered with red scales, and its aura was very powerful, and it had about the strength of a half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

Moreover, it sensed Ye Tian's fishing line and was about to escape.

However, it's still a bit slower

Burst!

The line runs through its body, turning into a hook and carrying it straight up.

Soon, this one was caught by Ye Tian.

As soon as the black river came out, this fish burst out with a terrifying aura and wanted to resist, but it was sealed by Ye Tian's hand, and it completely turned into a red fish with no resistance power

Ye Tian caught a fish and attracted the attention of several peak Legendary Realm lords nearby.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Good luck Endless Lord, I have been fishing here for countless Eternal Eras, and I haven't caught a single one, but the Endless Lord is powerful, and it didn't take long for me to catch a fish. "

"Lord Endless, how about selling me this fish?"

For the peak Legendary Realm Lord who wanted to buy fish, Ye Tian apologized: "I'm sorry, I haven't eaten the fish in this long black river, so I'm going to keep 100 million for myself."

The other peak Legendary Realm lords didn't say anything, after all, catching a fish was nothing new, such as the frontier lord whose fishing skills were the first, and he often caught fish, so there was nothing to be surprised about.

The only thing that is surprising is that not long after Ye Tiancai came, he caught a fish.

They only thought that Ye Tian was lucky, and they didn't think that Ye Tian's strength had reached the third level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord at all.

After all, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to be promoted to the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

And the peak legendary realm lord who has just been promoted will not even be able to have the top supreme skills, and after knowing many top supreme skills, he has to fuse time and space, and after fusing time and space to give birth to time and space control power, he has to create time and space supreme skills, so that he can become the peak legendary realm lord of the third level.

Therefore, they would not think that Ye Tian had reached the third level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, they would only think that Ye Tian was lucky.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Black Saint Mountain, and he was going to go back to share this red fish with the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saint Land.

If only the lords above the Legendary Realm could eat such a delicacy, otherwise he really wanted to share it with his family, but unfortunately they couldn't eat it.

Soon.

Ye Tian returned to the True Void Holy Land and notified the other Legendary Realm Lords and the Immortal Lords of their arrival. _
